# registerForNotifications

**Instance Method**

Registers to receive push notifications.

## Declaration

```swift
void registerForNotifications();
```

## Discussion

To subscribe to changes and register for push notifications, see `saveSubscription` in the [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Database] class.

## Receiving Notifications

- **addNotificationListener**: Adds a function to call when a push notification occurs.
- **removeNotificationListener**: Removes a function to call when a push notification occurs.
- **unregisterForNotifications**: Unregisters to receive push notifications.
- **isRegisteredForNotifications**: Boolean value indicating whether this container is registered to receive push notifications.
